vocab.meaning_vi: hỏi thăm, kiểm tra tình hình
vocab.example: I'm just calling to check in on how the product is working.
vocab.example_vi: Tôi gọi để hỏi thăm xem sản phẩm đang hoạt động thế nào.

vocab.example: Customer satisfaction is our top priority after the sale.
vocab.example_vi: Sự hài lòng của khách hàng là ưu tiên hàng đầu sau khi bán.

vocab.example: We want to turn every buyer into a loyal customer.
vocab.example_vi: Chúng tôi muốn biến mỗi người mua thành khách hàng trung thành.

vocab.example: Would you like to renew your subscription next month?
vocab.example_vi: Anh có muốn gia hạn gói đăng ký vào tháng sau không?

vocab.example: Our support team resolved the issue within a day.
vocab.example_vi: Đội hỗ trợ của chúng tôi đã giải quyết vấn đề trong một ngày.

vocab.example: Please fill out this feedback form after using the service.
vocab.example_vi: Vui lòng điền biểu mẫu phản hồi này sau khi dùng dịch vụ.

vocab.example: We offer ongoing support even after the contract ends.
vocab.example_vi: Chúng tôi cung cấp hỗ trợ liên tục kể cả sau khi hết hợp đồng.

vocab.example: Good after-sales care really improves customer retention.
vocab.example_vi: Chăm sóc sau bán tốt thực sự giúp giữ chân khách hàng.

listening.title: A check-in call with a client

lines.speaker: Hoa (customer success)
lines.text: Hi Mr. Dũng, I'm just calling to check in on your experience.

lines.speaker: Dũng (client)
lines.text: Hi Hoa, thanks for calling. Everything is working well so far.

lines.speaker: Hoa (customer success)
lines.text: That's great to hear! Is there anything we can help with?

lines.speaker: Dũng (client)
lines.text: Actually, we had one issue with the login page last week.

lines.speaker: Hoa (customer success)
lines.text: I'm sorry about that. Did our support team resolve the issue?

lines.speaker: Dũng (client)
lines.text: Yes, they resolved it quickly. I really appreciate the ongoing support.

lines.speaker: Hoa (customer success)
lines.text: Wonderful. We always try to make every client a loyal customer.

lines.speaker: Dũng (client)
lines.text: I'm happy with the service. When does our subscription end?

lines.speaker: Hoa (customer success)
lines.text: It ends next month. Would you like to renew your subscription now?

lines.speaker: Dũng (client)
lines.text: Yes, please. Could you also send me a feedback form?

options: To check in on his experience

questions.q: What problem did Dũng's company have last week?
options: An issue with the login page

questions.q: What does Dũng want to do with his subscription?

shadowing: I'm just calling to check in on your experience with us.
Did our support team resolve the issue you had last week?
We always try to make every customer a loyal customer here.
Would you like to renew your subscription for another year now?
Could you please fill out this short feedback form for us?
